---
name: Pull Request
about: Template for pull requests
title: '[PR] '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Description
<!-- Describe your changes in detail -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Delete the options that are not relevant -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Test update/addition

## Related Issue
<!-- Link to related issue(s) -->
Fixes #<issue_number>

## Motivation and Context
<!-- Why is this change required? What problem does it solve? -->

## How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Describe your testing process -->
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] All tests pass: `make test`

## Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Add screenshots if your changes affect UI -->

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested with Docker: `make test-docker`

## Performance Impact
<!-- Does this change affect performance? If so, describe how -->

## Breaking Changes
<!-- Does this change break existing functionality? If so, describe what and how to migrate -->

## Additional Notes
<!-- Any additional information -->
